HomePage.title: Agent Workflow Hub
HomePage.hero_subtitle: A complete protocol that gives your AI Coding Agent memory, consistency, and a massive external brain.
HomePage.feature_1_desc: Instead of feeding the AI your entire codebase every time, the protocol uses STATE.md to maintain a lightweight, highly accurate memory of the current task. Seamlessly hand off context across multiple chat sessions.
HomePage.feature_2_desc: Enforce a Single Source of Truth for your design system. The AI reads your UI guidelines before writing any frontend code, ensuring pixel-perfect adherence to your brand.
HomePage.feature_3_desc: Offload massive project documentation to Google NotebookLM via our MCP Server. Save thousands of IDE tokens by letting the AI intelligently query the knowledge base only when needed.
HomePage.feature_4_desc: Built-in Git Hooks recursively scan for .env files to prevent API key leaks. Enterprise-grade file writing locks prevent automated agents from accidentally corrupting your symlinks.

ManualPage.title: User Manual & Documentation
ManualPage.subtitle: Everything you need to master the Agentic Workflow Protocol. Learn how to configure your agents, manage state, and utilize the NotebookLM MCP tools effectively.
ManualPage.intro_desc: The Agent Workflow Protocol combines local state management (.ai directory) with an external intelligence hub (NotebookLM MCP Server). The Orchestrator middleware safely bridges your local IDE agents (Cursor, Windsurf, Cline) with cloud-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
ManualPage.install_desc: Run the initialization script in your project root to set up the protocol environment.
ManualPage.auth_desc: To use the MCP tools, you must authenticate your Google account to grant the server access to your Notebooks.
ManualPage.auth_sub_1_desc: This script launches a local Chrome instance. Simply log into Google, and it will securely extract the necessary session cookies into the local auth.json file.
ManualPage.usage_desc: If you are using the Claude Desktop App, you can configure it to automatically start the MCP server by adding this to your claude_desktop_config.json:
ManualPage.tools_desc: Once the MCP server is running, your AI Agent can invoke these tools to interact with NotebookLM.
ManualPage.tool_1_desc: Lifecycle management for your AI notebooks.
ManualPage.tool_1_what: A tool to create, rename, delete, or configure Notebooks.
ManualPage.tool_1_how: Sends an RPC request to Google's backend to mutate the notebook state. The 'configure_chat' action injects a persistent system prompt into the notebook.
ManualPage.tool_1_usage: Use this when starting a new project module to create an isolated knowledge base.
ManualPage.tool_1_result: Returns the ID of the newly created or modified notebook.
ManualPage.tool_2_what: A tool to upload local files, URLs, or sync Google Drive links into the notebook.
ManualPage.tool_2_how: Uploads the raw text or markdown to the NotebookLM ingestion engine, generating a unique Source ID.
ManualPage.tool_2_usage: When you have a new API documentation link or an architectural decision record, ask the AI to add it to the notebook.
ManualPage.tool_2_result: The source is successfully parsed and becomes queryable by the AI.
ManualPage.tool_3_desc: The primary interaction tool for RAG queries.
ManualPage.tool_3_what: A tool for the AI to ask questions and receive answers based solely on the uploaded sources.
ManualPage.tool_3_how: Utilizes NotebookLM's grounded generation. If a specific source ID is provided, it restricts the query to that document.
ManualPage.tool_3_usage: When the AI encounters an unknown API, it queries the notebook instead of guessing or searching the web.
ManualPage.tool_3_result: A detailed, factual response with inline citations pointing to the exact source documents.
ManualPage.tool_4_desc: Transforms text into multimedia learning assets.
ManualPage.tool_4_what: Commands the Studio engine to create Audio Podcasts, Quizzes, Study Guides, or Mind Maps.
ManualPage.tool_4_how: Triggers a long-running asynchronous job on the backend. The Orchestrator polls the job status until completion.
ManualPage.tool_4_usage: After uploading meeting notes, you can ask the AI to generate an Audio Overview (Podcast) to listen to on your commute.
ManualPage.tool_4_result: A URL or downloaded file containing the requested multimedia asset.
